title: aegilemma peregrina
intro: Aegilemma peregrina, also known as the African starflower, is a plant species that belongs to the family Menispermaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant's roots and leaves have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing. Aegilemma peregrina can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
